steps.title: Identify the subject and the temporal context
steps.content: The subject “the Wheeling National Heritage Area” is singular. The phrase “has long been known” uses present perfect tense, anchoring the region's defining attributes to the present moment.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement and select the appropriate tense
steps.content:
The verb must be singular to match the subject. Is (present tense) aligns with the present perfect tense of “has long been known,” indicating the region's attributes extend into the present.

The plural forms in C and D violate subject-verb agreement, and was would incorrectly place these defining attributes in the past.

This matches choice B — B is correct.
